svg.title: Connect any agent to Lerim
svg.desc: Animated SVG showing agent traces flowing through a cleaner, being registered once with Lerim, then ingested by Lerim.

g.text: Export clean completed-run JSONL, add the folder once, and Lerim ingests those traces into source-backed context.
Ingestion path: custom agents send traces into Lerim.
CLEAN JSONL · PROJECT ADD · LERIM INGESTS
